visible_entities.position: center right, extending into the pot

visible_entities.desc: cooked spaghetti noodles coated in red tomato sauce
black electric pressure cooker with a stainless steel inner pot
stainless steel lid with a black rim
dark brown wooden table surface

atomic_facts.fact: A hand is using a wooden spoon to mix spaghetti with red sauce inside an electric pressure cooker.
The lid of the pressure cooker is detached and resting on the table to the left.
The spaghetti appears fully cooked and coated in sauce.
A black power cord is visible extending from the back of the pressure cooker.

spatial: The scene is a top-down view of a kitchen counter. The open pressure cooker is centered, with its lid to the left. A hand enters from the top right, holding a spoon that dips into the center of the pot where the pasta is located.
